name: Pasta with Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a pan and lightly sauté ham and mushrooms; set aside.
2. Blanch asparagus in boiling water until just cooked through (about 4 minutes).
3. Remove asparagus from the water and cook pasta, al dente, in the same water, adding more water if necessary. Drain.
4. Heat 4 tablespoons butter and olive oil in a large sauté pan. Add garlic and cook for about 1 minute, then add the pasta, tossing to coat. Stir in cream and cheese; cook for 1-2 minutes until slightly thickened.
5. Lower heat and stir in egg yolks; toss for about 1 minute to set the eggs and further thicken the sauce.
6. Add asparagus, ham, and mushrooms and cook until heated through. Season with salt and pepper and garnish with chives. Serve hot.
